# Shahab Abbasi - SEO and Digital Marketing Agency
> Independent SEO and digital marketing consultancy based in Islamabad, Pakistan, serving clients globally. Specializing in technical SEO, on-page SEO, local SEO, e-commerce SEO, content strategy, link building, Google Business Profile optimization, and PPC.

This site is fully pre-rendered static HTML for fast indexing by search engines and AI engines (Google, Bing, ChatGPT, Perplexity, Claude, Gemini). Every URL returns a complete, server-rendered page on first request.
